user_query: I'm organizing a superhero-themed charity event and I want to impress the attendees with fascinating superhero facts. Can you provide me with random trivia about superheroes and their powers? It would also be great if you could suggest some popular superheroes to invite as special guests.

TaskList.description: Gather random trivia about superheroes and their powers.
Compile a list of popular superheroes that could be invited as special guests.
Combine the trivia and the guest list for the event presentation.
